title: Jhinder Bandi
writer: Saradindu Bandopadhyay, Anthony Hope, Tapan Sinha
actors: Uttam Kumar, Arundhati Devi, Soumitra Chatterjee
plot: A person comes to meet with Gauri Shankar Roy (Uttam Kumar) living in Kolkata. He introduces himself as a 'fauji Sardar' of Jhind, Jhind being a small kingdom in Madhya Pradesh. He says that the to-be king of Jhind, Shankar Singh,...
